disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Continuous, severe right-upper-quadrant pain for about 8 hours that has not eased, radiating to the right shoulder tip
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and how long has it lasted?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's high up under my right ribs and it's been constant since dinner last night, about eight hours now. It shoots through to the tip of my right shoulder.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: This episode differs from previous short self-resolving bouts of similar pain after fatty meals
trigger_question_examples: Have you had pain like this before?
How is this episode different from past ones?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had little bouts here before after rich food, but they always passed within an hour. This one just won't stop and it's far worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fever with alternating chills and sweats
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt hot, feverish or shivery?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I keep going hot and then shivery, and I've been sweating. My daughter took my temperature and it was 38.5.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe nausea with three episodes of bilious vomiting and inability to tolerate oral fluids
trigger_question_examples: Have you been sick or vomited?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've thrown up three times, greenish and bitter, and I can't even keep a sip of water down now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Onset shortly after a fatty meal
trigger_question_examples: What were you doing when it started?
Did anything seem to bring it on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on after a fatty dinner last night.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain is worse on deep inspiration; patient splints breathing to avoid it
trigger_question_examples: Does taking a deep breath change the pain?
Are you breathing shallowly to protect the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, if I breathe in deeply it stabs, so I'm taking small shallow breaths.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive worsening of pain toward becoming generalised across the whole abdomen (screened as a warning sign; not present at baseline)
trigger_question_examples: Is the pain still just under the ribs, or is it spreading across your whole tummy?
Has the pain changed to cover your whole belly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, right now it's still up under the right ribs — it hasn't spread across my whole tummy.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: It's mostly on the right, I think — it's hard to tell when it hurts this much.
